impact: This gives the worker an exact fixture path and schema shape for the active lifecycle validator task, preventing another broad or mis-targeted retry after the earlier missing-field and fixture-discovery failures. The daemon prompt already reads the task board, so these guardrails directly influence the next autonomous cycle without touching PP&D domain implementation artifacts.
summary: Tighten lifecycle fail-closed recovery instructions in the daemon task board.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 3 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
